template.name: disbursement_bank_statement_received
template.description: Record a bank statement line confirming cash has left the FBO account for a disbursement. Debits Control (10102) and credits Settled (10100) on the house ledger, and debits Cash Balances - Control (11902) and credits Cash Balances (11900) on the allocation ledger. Direction is reversed from UC1 T5401 (inbound) because cash is leaving the bank.

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification: Control increases (staged for reconciliation) and Settled decreases (cash left the bank). Total house assets unchanged.

Asset-to-asset reclassification on the allocation ledger: Cash Balances - Control increases (staged for reconciliation) and Cash Balances decreases (FDIC fund location reduced). Total allocation assets unchanged.

template.trigger: Bank statement line item confirms an outbound ACH disbursement has been debited from the FBO account.

ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where confirmed bank cash (Settled) and reconciliation staging (Control) are maintained for the outbound disbursement.
ledger_scope_descriptions.fdic_tracking: FDIC tracking ledger (ID 5002) where Cash Balances and Cash Balances - Control positions are updated for FDIC tracking.

accounting_treatments.description: Reclassify confirmed outbound cash from Settled to Control for reconciliation staging; no P&L impact.
Record the FDIC fund location change for the outbound disbursement by debiting Cash Balances - Control and crediting Cash Balances on the allocation ledger.

account_code_validations.description: House control (reconciliation staging) bank cash account; per-file instance selected by statement_file_id external_id. Debited for the outbound disbursement amount.
House settled bank cash account (confirmed physical cash at Purple Splash FBO bank account). Credited to reflect cash leaving the bank.
Cash Balances - Control on the allocation ledger; debited to stage the amount for reconciliation on the FDIC tracking ledger.
Cash Balances asset on the allocation ledger; credited to reflect the FDIC fund location decrease from the outbound disbursement.

line_item_description.description: Optional human-readable description from the bank statement line.

statement_file_id.description: External_id of the source bank statement file; used to select the per-file Control account instance.

transaction_ref.description: Bank-provided transaction reference identifier for this statement line item.

legs.description: Record outbound cash confirmed by bank statement; settled decreases to reflect money leaving the FBO account.
Mirror the bank statement confirmation on the allocation ledger for FDIC tracking.

examples.name: disbursement_statement_500
examples.description: Bank statement line confirming $300.00 ACH disbursement has left the FBO account. Dr Control (10102) / Cr Settled (10100).
